productName: 0.5g Live Resin Inf. 2 Pack Joints - Family Jewels - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps MILF flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of sage and sweet, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
